message:
Command `
# Check available PnR tools
echo "=== LibreLane/OpenLane availability ==="
which librelane 2>/dev/null && librelane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "librelane not found on PATH"
which openlane 2>/dev/null && openlane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "openlane not found on PATH"
python3 -m openlane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "python3 -m openlane not available"

echo ""
echo "=== Python path check ==="
python3 -c "import openlane; print('openlane module:', openlane.__version__)" 2>/dev/null || echo "openlane python module not importable"

echo ""
echo "=== Quick look at chip.v ==="
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v | head -60

echo ""
echo "=== macro.cfg ==="
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/macro.cfg

echo ""
echo "=== pdn_cfg.tcl (first 40 lines) ==="
head -40 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/pdn_cfg.tcl
` executed with exit code 0.

// mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu chip top-level
// Connects padframe (IO ring) to core wrapper (compute subsystem)
//
// Hierarchy:
//   mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip
//     +-- mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_padframe  (IO pad ring)
//     +-- mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper   (core wrapper)

=== pdn_cfg.tcl (first 40 lines) ===
# Power delivery network configuration for mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper
# met4/met5 main grid + met3 bridge for CF_SRAM_1024x32 macro power
# Compatible with OpenLane 2 / LibreLane

source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/set_global_connections.tcl
set_global_connections

set secondary []
foreach vdd $::env(VDD_NETS) gnd $::env(GND_NETS) {
    if { $vdd != $::env(VDD_NET)} {
        lappend secondary $vdd

        set db_net [[ord::get_db_block] findNet $vdd]
        if {$db_net == "NULL"} {
            set net [odb::dbNet_create [ord::get_db_block] $vdd]
            $net setSpecial
            $net setSigType "POWER"
        }
    }

    if { $gnd != $::env(GND_NET)} {
        lappend secondary $gnd

        set db_net [[ord::get_db_block] findNet $gnd]
        if {$db_net == "NULL"} {
            set net [odb::dbNet_create [ord::get_db_block] $gnd]
            $net setSpecial
            $net setSigType "GROUND"
        }
    }
}

set_voltage_domain -name CORE -power $::env(VDD_NET) -ground $::env(GND_NET) \
    -secondary_power $secondary

# ── Main stdcell grid: met4 (vertical) / met5 (horizontal) ──

define_pdn_grid \
    -name stdcell_grid \
    -starts_with POWER \

extras.command:
# Check available PnR tools
echo "=== LibreLane/OpenLane availability ==="
which librelane 2>/dev/null && librelane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "librelane not found on PATH"
which openlane 2>/dev/null && openlane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "openlane not found on PATH"
python3 -m openlane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "python3 -m openlane not available"

echo ""
echo "=== Python path check ==="
python3 -c "import openlane; print('openlane module:', openlane.__version__)" 2>/dev/null || echo "openlane python module not importable"

echo ""
echo "=== Quick look at chip.v ==="
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v | head -60

echo ""
echo "=== macro.cfg ==="
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/macro.cfg

echo ""
echo "=== pdn_cfg.tcl (first 40 lines) ==="
head -40 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/pdn_cfg.tcl
